rationale: Educ. Code §48.003 governs student eligibility for the Foundation School Program based on age and enrollment. It contains no reference to homestead exemptions or property tax values, so a change to Tax Code §11.13(b) does not conflict.
quote: A student is entitled to the benefits of the Foundation School Program if, on September 1 of the school year, the student:
_note: Rule text concerns student eligibility criteria only; no fiscal or property-tax linkage present in this section.
